name: GitHub Copilot CLI (DeepSeek BYOK)

principal_agent.category: LLM-as-principal (DeepSeek V4 Pro — Anthropic-compatible endpoint via BYOK)

description: GitHub Copilot CLI forge instrument with DeepSeek V4 Pro as backend (BYOK Anthropic-compatible endpoint). Wire via env vars: COPILOT_PROVIDER_TYPE=anthropic, COPILOT_PROVIDER_BASE_URL=https://api.deepseek.com/anthropic, COPILOT_PROVIDER_API_KEY=sk-..., COPILOT_MODEL=deepseek-v4-pro. Source script: /root/.bashrc.copilot. F1-F13 enforced.

configuration.notes: Must use provider_type=anthropic. openai type triggers 400: 'reasoning_content in thinking mode must be passed back to the API'. DeepSeek Anthropic Messages API endpoint avoids this issue.

verification_receipt.test_prompt: Reply with the literal string: hello from deepseek via copilot cli. Do not add anything else.
verification_receipt.actual_response: hello from deepseek via copilot cli

constitutional_compliance.F1_AMANAH: inherited from arifOS governance; no execution outside lease
constitutional_compliance.F2_TRUTH: BYOK ensures response attribution; DeepSeek model verifiable
constitutional_compliance.F11_AUDIT: every call emits receipt to VAULT999 if wired
constitutional_compliance.F13_SOVEREIGN: F13 retains veto over irreversible actions
